creator: dougs@dawnsign.com
text:
(In reply to dougs@dawnsign.com from comment #2)
After rerunning gitup, it seems to have gone through cleanly. Gitup was last run on 7/23 at 10:00 GMT. So it has been a bit more and 24 hours since then.

When I reran gitup, it did complain of some files in graphics.mesa-dri. I uninstalled it and gitup didn't complain on the next run.
